chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5852 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "اِصْبِرْ عَلَى أَعْدَاءِ اَلنِّعَمِ فَإِنَّكَ لَنْ تُكَافِئَ مَنْ عَصَى اَللَّهَ فِيكَ بِأَفْضَلَ مِنْ أَنْ تُطِيعَ اَللَّهَ فِيهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5852 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn Wahb, from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), peace be upon him, who said:
"Be patient with those who are envious of your blessings, for you cannot repay one who disobeys Allah (swt) regarding you with anything better than obeying Allah (swt) concerning him."
